creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm going to update the port to 0.10.0.

Thanks for the update Phil. Please, next time, use tools like poudriere to check in a clean environment. The patch, as it is, does not even build. Some shebangs need to be fixed, it has a new dependency on ncurses, etc, etc.

Really, poudriere is great :-)

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#testing-poudriere

If you feel like it, you can try and work in an update to 0.11.0 once I land the 0.10.0 in the repo (build tests in other configurations are at work).

Thanks!
